title: Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management entity lists
description: Desired state for Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management entity lists consumed by scripts/Deploy-IRMEntityLists.ps1. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/insider-risk-management-settings-priority-user-groups

name.description: Unique entity list identifier. Maps to the -Name parameter of New-InsiderRiskEntityList. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchange/new-insiderriskentitylist

type.description: Entity list type. Immutable after creation -- changing this requires deleting and recreating the list. Maps to -Type on New-InsiderRiskEntityList. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchange/new-insiderriskentitylist

displayName.description: Human-readable display name. Maps to -DisplayName on New-InsiderRiskEntityList and Set-InsiderRiskEntityList. Optional.

description.description: Free-form description. Maps to -Description on New-InsiderRiskEntityList and Set-InsiderRiskEntityList. Optional.

entities.description: Member identifiers. UPNs for UserType, group identifiers for GroupType, site URLs for SiteType. Maps to -Entities on New/Set-InsiderRiskEntityList (full replace on Set). Omitting this key means do-not-manage membership; an empty array means desired-empty. Comparison is order-insensitive. Optional.
